title: dendranthema zawadzkii var. naktongense
intro: Dendranthema zawadzkii var. naktongense, also known as Korean mountain astilbe or Korean mountain gentian, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, attributed to its flavonoid and phenolic acid content. The health benefits associated with this plant include reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and antioxidant activity, making it a potential remedy for various health conditions. Dendranthema zawadzkii var. naktongense is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and may be used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
